fix: resolve all TypeScript build errors for Vercel deployment

- Fix tsconfig extends to use relative paths (TS doesn't honour exports field)
- Add typesVersions to @pulse/db and @pulse/config packages
- Add Relationships: [] and CompositeTypes to database.types.ts (Supabase JS v2.103 requirement)
- Fix Insert types for organizations, organization_members, responses, response_answers
  to make nullable/defaulted columns optional (matches real Supabase generator output)
- Export Json type from @pulse/db index
- Fix implicit any on setAll cookie params in server.ts and middleware.ts
- Add missing component stubs: auth forms, dashboard shell, survey runner, kiosk runner, etc.
- Add next-intl i18n config (src/i18n/request.ts, routing.ts, messages/en.json)
- Add increment_distribution_count RPC to database types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Claude/saas platform setup l zf6 h (#112)

* fix(core.js): rename install_confirmed → install for dashboard compatibility

The core.js PWA tracking was sending "install_confirmed" but most dashboards
(including le-resto/espace-admin.html) expect "install". Changed the event
name to "install" so install counts appear correctly in all dashboards.

Also updated 1stat.html to count both "install" and "install_confirmed"
(legacy) to handle existing data in the spreadsheet.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

* fix(tracking): 2 bugs critiques signup/install à 0

1. core.js — track() envoyait le NOM du restaurant (ex: "Le coreen")
   au lieu du SLUG (ex: "le-coreen") comme clé `resto`.
   Résultat : scans matchaient (avant loadConfig) mais signup/install
   ne matchaient pas (après loadConfig) → affichés à 0 dans dashboard.
   Fix : track() utilise toujours getRestoSlug().

2. espace-admin.html (tous restaurants) — dashboard cherchait
   s.install_confirmed mais core.js envoie s.install depuis le fix précédent.
   Fix : s.install ?? s.install_confirmed (accept les deux formats).

Fichiers modifiés : assets/core.js + 8× */admin/espace-admin.html

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

* fix: show PIN validation code directly on dashboard tab

Staff can now see the dynamic PIN code immediately when they open the
admin without having to navigate to the Coupon tab.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

* fix: make coupon KPI card clickable to navigate to coupon tab

Clicking "Coupon du mois" on the dashboard now navigates to the Coupon tab.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

* fix: show coupon validation count as number in dashboard KPI card

The coupon KPI card now shows the count of coupon validations this month
as a number (like other KPI cards), with "Actif/Inactif" as a small status.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

* feat: système complet abonnement Stripe + facturation admin

Ajout du système SaaS complet pour Fidelavis :

Assets
- assets/plans.js : config Stripe, définition offres (Essentiel 97€/Pro 149€),
  helpers isPro(), hasFeature(), getPlanLabel(), formatPrice(), getStatusLabel()
- assets/billing.js : FidelavisBilling.startCheckout() via GAS proxy,
  openPortal() pour portail Stripe, initCheckoutButtons() auto-bind [data-plan]
- assets/admin-billing.js : FidelavisAdminBilling.renderBilling() — lit config.json
  et affiche compte, abonnement, statut, factures dans l'admin

Google Apps Script
- apps-script/stripe/stripeCheckout.gs : proxy GAS → crée Checkout Sessions Stripe
  (setup 199€ + abonnement) et sessions portail client
- apps-script/stripe/stripeWebhook.gs : webhook Stripe — gère
  checkout.session.completed, invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed,
  subscription.deleted, subscription.updated → Google Sheet + emails
- apps-script/pennylane/pennylaneSync.gs : facturation électronique Pennylane,
  createSetupInvoice(), createSubscriptionInvoice(), syncPendingInvoices()

Admin client
- _template/admin/billing.html + le-coreen/admin/billing.html :
  page "Compte & Facturation" avec sections Compte, Abonnement, Factures,
  bouton "Gérer mon abonnement" (portail Stripe)
- espace-admin.html (template + le-coreen) : ajout onglet "💳 Compte" (admin only)
- _template/config.json : ajout champs billing (plan, subscriptionStatus,
  setupPaid, stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, nextBillingDate, invoices)

Documentation
- apps-script/stripe/BILLING-SETUP.md : guide complet de configuration

https://claude.ai/code/session_016wF27YkF21e7Pdv4o9MFtn

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OpenAI Realtime: add LLMContextAggregatorPair + LLMRunFrame (from official example)

OpenAI Realtime was missing context aggregators and LLMRunFrame.
The official example (19-openai-realtime.py) shows it needs:
- LLMContext with greeting
- LLMContextAggregatorPair with SileroVADAnalyzer
- Pipeline: input → user_aggregator → service → output → assistant_aggregator
- LLMRunFrame on connect
- AudioConfiguration with SemanticTurnDetection

Without these, the service connected but never processed audio.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add .gitignore with Terraform entries to exclude large provider binaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve Gemini model compatibility and enhance realtime chat

- Fix "Thinking level not supported" error by conditionally applying thinkingConfig only to Gemini 3.x models (gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-3.1-pro-preview, gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview)
- Add THINKING_MODELS set to identify models that support thinkingLevel parameter
- Enhance realtime chat with global conversations subscription for sidebar auto-refresh
- Add message deduplication in realtime subscription to prevent duplicate messages
- Improve auto-scroll reliability with requestAnimationFrame
- Add userRef for stable reference in realtime callbacks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add mobile OTP verification and Google OAuth to registration/login

Backend:
- OTPRecord + GoogleAuthRequest + GoogleCompleteRequest models
- phone_verified field on User; password_hash optional for Google accounts
- POST /auth/send-otp — generates 6-digit OTP, sends via Twilio (logs
  to console in dev if Twilio not configured), rate-limited to 3/5min
- POST /auth/register — now requires otp query param, verifies before
  creating account with phone_verified=true
- POST /auth/google — verifies Google access token via userinfo endpoint,
  returns JWT for existing users or needs_phone=true for new users
- POST /auth/google/complete — verifies OTP then creates Google-linked account
- TTL index on otp_records.expires_at (auto-deletes after 5 min)
- Added twilio, google-auth, httpx to requirements.txt

Frontend:
- AuthModal rewritten with 3-step registration flow:
  Step 1: name/email/phone/password → Send OTP
  Step 2: 6-box OTP input with paste support + resend countdown
  Step 3: account created, logged in
- Google OAuth button on both login and register tabs
- New Google users shown phone collection + OTP step before account creation
- @react-oauth/google installed; App.js wrapped with GoogleOAuthProvider

Env vars needed on Render:
  TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER
  GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID (same value needed in Vercel as REACT_APP_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

replaces "KI-Belegschaft" (non-existent compound) with "KI-Agenten",
fixes "rein/raus" slang inconsistent with formal Sie-form, corrects
typo "Anfragervolumen" → "Anfragevolumen", replaces ambiguous

"Kontaktformular-Einsendungen" calque with "Kontaktanfragen"
throughout Privacy copy.

feat: add AI persona system, auth, chat redesign, and media sharing

- Add 6 AI characters (Sara, Aman, Surbhi, Harry, Spider-Man, Alex) with
  unique personalities, backstories, and different Gemini models per character
  (gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-3.1-pro-preview)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(harness-tests): v5 direct driver + me.consider, viewer doc, continuity header

v5: keeps v4 architecture but adds me.consider(prompt) — cheap inference,
text in/text out, no edit tools. Default on_tick uses consider every tick.
Counts against same 50-turn budget as reflectOn.

Smoke tests:
- v5-sonnet: composite 7 (game 25, died to grue at step 18)
- v5-opus: composite -10 (game 40, full 50-turn budget burn at step 50)

Direct driver hits cellar much faster (~step 11) but burns budget per
tick. v4-opus's composite 17 still beats v5-opus's -10 — navigator with
deliberate reflection wins on cost-efficiency.

Refined v5 defaults:
- goal: "get a high score in this game"
- memory: "just woke up here, not sure how things work (yet)"
- (was a verbose API explanation)

Also:
- New doc: docs/playthrough-viewer.md — how to open the viewer, window API
- Journal continuity header at the top — "where we are right now" for
  fresh context windows. Captures architecture, run command, all v0-v5
  generations, key findings, open threads.
- Journal session 16 (v5 results)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add server-side tab control API, accessibility fixes, and dashboard example (#3)

* Add updateGlassTabsUI() for programmatic tab switching

Implements the server-side equivalent of Shiny's updateTabsetPanel().
Sends a custom message to the browser which finds the target navbar by
data-ns and programmatically clicks the tab link, reusing all existing
halo animation and Shiny input reporting logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add showGlassTab, hideGlassTab, appendGlassTab, removeGlassTab

Completes the server-side tab control API to match Shiny's tabsetPanel
capabilities. Refactors initTabs to support re-initialization and event
delegation so dynamically appended tabs work without additional setup.

- showGlassTab / hideGlassTab: toggle tab visibility; auto-switches away
  from a hidden active tab to the first remaining visible tab
- appendGlassTab / removeGlassTab: add or remove tabs at runtime; both
  trigger a clean re-init of the tab engine to pick up DOM changes
- initTabs refactored: cleans up old event listeners on re-init, uses a
  single delegated click handler, exposes navbar._gtActivate() for
  programmatic switching without simulated clicks
- Key navigation skips hidden tabs
- CSS: .gt-tab-link.gt-tab-hidden { display: none }
- README: function reference table and server-side tab control example
- CLAUDE.md: development notes, architecture, and change history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix five code-review findings

1. Initial active tab now reported to Shiny via shiny:sessioninitialized
   event so glassTabsServer() is never NULL before first user click.

2. glassTabsUI() validates the selected argument against panel values and
   stops with a clear message on mismatch, preventing the silent dead-tab
   bug caused by an unmatched value.

3. useGlassTabs() version bumped from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 to match DESCRIPTION
   and prevent browsers serving stale cached assets after upgrades.

4. README duplicate overview paragraph removed; copyright symbol replaced
   with ASCII (c) to avoid encoding rendering issues.

5. Keyboard handler now requires a tab link inside the navbar to hold focus
   before handling arrow keys, eliminating unexpected tab switches when
   document.body is the active element. Tab links gain tabindex=0,
   role=tab, and aria-selected; navbar gets role=tablist; panes get
   role=tabpanel. aria-selected is kept in sync by activateTab().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Regenerate NAMESPACE and Rd files for new tab functions

Runs devtools::document() to export updateGlassTabsUI, showGlassTab,
hideGlassTab, appendGlassTab, and removeGlassTab — required for the
functions to be accessible from an installed package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Store Analytics dashboard example and fix Shiny.bindAll on append

The dashboard example demonstrates all server-side tab control features
in a realistic retail analytics context:
- glassSelect (region picker) + glassMultiSelect (metric filter)
- glassFilterTags for tag-pill display
- showGlassTab / hideGlassTab — Admin tab toggled by checkbox
- appendGlassTab / removeGlassTab — Compare tab added/removed at runtime
- updateGlassTabsUI — Next button advances through tabs programmatically
- glassTabsServer — active tab drives footer status line

Also calls Shiny.bindAll() on the newly inserted pane in the
glasstabs_append_tab JS handler so Shiny output bindings inside
dynamically appended tabs are correctly initialized.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix(Marketplace): recalculate reconciliation totals from group deltas (#1474)

CostReconciliationQuery computes xlsx_total from negative xlsx groups
only, so positive groups like compensations are excluded. This causes
a delta equal to the compensation amount even when all groups match.

Add recalculateTotals() in RunUserReconciliationAction that derives
the overall delta as the sum of per-group deltas — if every group
is matched, the total delta is 0.

CostReconciliationQuery is NOT modified (used by month-close and debug).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Dmaofk1xAcfVAbUeYkxyJd

commit.message:
✨ Add resolve_tool_dir helper + tests to prevent profile redirect bug

Replaces the fragile Path(__file__).parent.parent pattern used by every
CLI tool's Config subclass, which silently follows whichever editable copy
of a same-named package Python imports first. The new resolve_tool_dir()
uses importlib.metadata + direct_url.json to find the canonical source
folder, validates it against pyproject.toml [project].name, and fails
loud if anything is wrong.

Includes two test files:
- test_resolve_tool_dir.py: regression test simulating two editable
  copies of the same package on disk
- test_no_venv_in_cli_tool_sources.py: enforces that no CLI tool folder
  contains a .venv/ directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔧 Harden UTF-8 stream reconfiguration (fail-loud)

Replace silent try/except on sys.stdout/stderr.reconfigure() with an
explicit two-tier fallback (reconfigure → TextIOWrapper wrap) that raises
RuntimeError if neither works. Also write JSON output directly to
sys.stdout.buffer to guarantee UTF-8 regardless of wrapper state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Multi-session push: The Pulse globe, content intelligence, expansion radar V2, health dashboard, Warner UK feature gates

New features:
- The Pulse: live globe visualization with genre-colored hex polygons, flow arcs, arbitrage view, country detail sidebar (admin-only)
- Intelligence assistant: label-level AI chat with A&R, marketing, and executive modes
- Content & Social dashboard with content pool, posting calendar, and social analytics
- Artist Intelligence briefing V2 with deep sections
- Expansion Radar V2 with market heat grid and top expansion banner
- System Health ops dashboard with servers, scrapers, cron, quotas, pipeline, identity, inventory pages

Feature gating:
- Warner UK portal: Intelligence and The Pulse hidden via preview features config
- Admin-only items filtered from command palette (Cmd+K)
- The Pulse sidebar link restricted to admin users

Cleanup:
- Removed old expansion radar 3D globe (Three.js → react-globe.gl)
- Removed unused sound intelligence components (HeroStatsRow, LifecycleCard, etc.)
- Code-split heavy pages with React.lazy for bundle optimization
- LabelLayout route restructure: flat routes → nested layout wrapper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3 new leaderboard entries: Varun's Parallel Worlds, Binghamton, MacroBio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add server-side tab control API and fix code review findings

* Add updateGlassTabsUI() for programmatic tab switching

Implements the server-side equivalent of Shiny's updateTabsetPanel().
Sends a custom message to the browser which finds the target navbar by
data-ns and programmatically clicks the tab link, reusing all existing
halo animation and Shiny input reporting logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add showGlassTab, hideGlassTab, appendGlassTab, removeGlassTab

Completes the server-side tab control API to match Shiny's tabsetPanel
capabilities. Refactors initTabs to support re-initialization and event
delegation so dynamically appended tabs work without additional setup.

- showGlassTab / hideGlassTab: toggle tab visibility; auto-switches away
  from a hidden active tab to the first remaining visible tab
- appendGlassTab / removeGlassTab: add or remove tabs at runtime; both
  trigger a clean re-init of the tab engine to pick up DOM changes
- initTabs refactored: cleans up old event listeners on re-init, uses a
  single delegated click handler, exposes navbar._gtActivate() for
  programmatic switching without simulated clicks
- Key navigation skips hidden tabs
- CSS: .gt-tab-link.gt-tab-hidden { display: none }
- README: function reference table and server-side tab control example
- CLAUDE.md: development notes, architecture, and change history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix five code-review findings

1. Initial active tab now reported to Shiny via shiny:sessioninitialized
   event so glassTabsServer() is never NULL before first user click.

2. glassTabsUI() validates the selected argument against panel values and
   stops with a clear message on mismatch, preventing the silent dead-tab
   bug caused by an unmatched value.

3. useGlassTabs() version bumped from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 to match DESCRIPTION
   and prevent browsers serving stale cached assets after upgrades.

4. README duplicate overview paragraph removed; copyright symbol replaced
   with ASCII (c) to avoid encoding rendering issues.

5. Keyboard handler now requires a tab link inside the navbar to hold focus
   before handling arrow keys, eliminating unexpected tab switches when
   document.body is the active element. Tab links gain tabindex=0,
   role=tab, and aria-selected; navbar gets role=tablist; panes get
   role=tabpanel. aria-selected is kept in sync by activateTab().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

repository.name: glasstabs
repository.description: Animated Glass-Style Tabs and Filters for Shiny

commit.message:
fix: treat both-timeout as parity pass in streaming-parity-check

When no live stream is active, HTTP-FLV and HLS routes both timeout
(status 0) on staging and production. Previously this was treated as
FAIL because evaluateEndpointResult requires status in expectStatuses.

- Add status 0 to expectStatuses for stream_flv_route and stream_hls_route
- compareEndpointParity: short-circuit to true when both sides return
  status 0 (symmetric timeout = identical behavior = parity OK)

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

feat: Context-aware chatbot suggestions

- No project selected: shows onboarding prompts (what Caliber does, how to
  set up a project, discovery process, health checks, vendor evaluation)
- In project context: shows project-specific prompts (health summary,
  critical issues, executive summary, go-live status, vendor comparison)
- Header text adapts: "How can I help you get started?" vs
  "Ask me anything about your project"

commit.message:
feat(Marketplace): load compensation operations into marketplace_costs (#1473)

* feat(Marketplace): load compensation operations into marketplace_costs

Remove compensation filter from OzonCostsRawProcessor — operations with
type=compensation now flow into marketplace_costs as ozon_compensation.

Key changes:
- Compensation ops get category_code=ozon_compensation directly (bypass
  service name resolution to avoid noisy unknown-service warnings)
- Original amount sign preserved: positive=compensation (income),
  negative=decompensation (expense) — matches xlsx convention
- Non-compensation ops unchanged (still use abs)
- OzonServiceCategoryMap: add getCategoryName, getAllCategoryCodes, bump VERSION
- OzonXlsxServiceGroupMap: map ozon_compensation → "Компенсации и декомпенсации"

After deploy: create category + reprocess Jan 2026 costs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Dmaofk1xAcfVAbUeYkxyJd

* docs: clarify compensation sign convention in OzonCostsRawProcessor

Explain why compensation amounts are stored with original sign (not
inverted like services[]) — needed for SUM(amount) to match xlsx net.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Dmaofk1xAcfVAbUeYkxyJd

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix date entry: use local date default and upsert on re-submit

- Forms now initialize to the user's local date instead of UTC date
  (prevents showing yesterday's date for US timezones)
- All three entry APIs now upsert: re-submitting for an existing date
  updates the record instead of creating a duplicate
- Date stored at UTC noon to avoid day-boundary timezone shifts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
